items.title_zh: 不安全和不稳定推动选民参加秘鲁紧张的总统竞选
items.desc_en: After eight presidents in 10 years, many voters are looking for stability so the next president can focus on tackling crime and inequality.
items.desc_zh: 十年内当选了八位总统，许多选民都在寻求稳定，以便下一任总统能够专注于解决犯罪和不平等问题。

items.title_en: Remote work career risks for Gen Z are 'subtle, but material,' Harvard professor says: How to avoid the pitfalls
items.title_zh: 哈佛大学教授表示，Z 世代的远程工作职业风险“虽然微妙，但却是重大的”：如何避免陷阱
items.desc_en: Forgoing the office can have detrimental "scarring" impacts on young workers. Here's how to navigate the benefits and drawbacks of remote work.
items.desc_zh: 放弃办公室可能会对年轻员工产生有害的“创伤”影响。以下是如何了解远程工作的优点和缺点。

items.title_zh: 这些是经历了动荡的一周后最超买的股票

items.desc_zh: 惠普企业是本周最超买的股票之一。

items.title_en: Why Nokia missed the smartphone shift
items.title_zh: 为什么诺基亚错过了智能手机转型
items.desc_en: For years, Nokia didn't just compete in mobile phones — it defined the category. From the iconic 3310 to the best-selling Nokia 1100, the Finnish company built a global empire on durable devices, mass
items.desc_zh: 多年来，诺基亚不仅在手机领域展开竞争，而且还定义了这一类别。从标志性的 3310 到最畅销的诺基亚 1100，这家芬兰公司建立了一个耐用设备、大众设备的全球帝国

items.title_en: Amazon unveils latest warehouse robot as tech giants continue AI layoffs
items.title_zh: 科技巨头继续人工智能裁员，亚马逊推出最新仓库机器人
items.desc_en: "Our experience of robots is that it's actually driven up employment rather than the reverse," Amazon executive John Boumphrey told CNBC.
items.desc_zh: 亚马逊高管 John Boumphrey 告诉 CNBC：“我们对机器人的经验是，它实际上促进了就业，而不是相反。”

items.title_en: Trump to meet AI leaders to discuss US investment in their companies
items.title_zh: 特朗普将与人工智能领导人会面，讨论美国对其公司的投资
items.desc_en: The US president said on Friday he expects to meet the leaders of top AI companies next week.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统周五表示，他预计下周将与顶级人工智能公司的领导人会面。

items.title_en: Raspberry Pi raises profit forecast as AI demand grows
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能需求的增长，Raspberry Pi 提高了利润预期
items.desc_en: The firm said it expected to deliver adjusted earnings of at least $38m (£28.2m) for the first half of 2026.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，预计 2026 年上半年调整后收益至少为 3800 万美元（2820 万英镑）。

items.desc_zh: Ofcom 发现主要电话网络在火车上信号不佳，火车公司也降低了 Wi-Fi 速度。

items.title_zh: 劳埃德银行、哈利法克斯银行和苏格兰银行应用程序用户报告服务中断
items.desc_en: Thousands of Lloyds Banking Group customers reported problems with online banking access on Wednesday morning.
items.desc_zh: 周三上午，数千名劳埃德银行集团客户报告了网上银行访问问题。

items.title_en: Meta won't track its workers' clicks - but only for half an hour at a time
items.title_zh: Meta 不会跟踪其工作人员的点击 - 但一次只能跟踪半小时
items.desc_en: According to an internal memo, new controls will allow employees to pause the data collection for "up to 30 minutes at a time".
items.desc_zh: 根据一份内部备忘录，新的控制措施将允许员工“一次最多暂停 30 分钟”的数据收集。
